artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His production style is characterized by a fusion of electronic dance music elements with dancehall rhythms, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention in the Latin electronic scene.

He has collaborated with several well-known names in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer. These collaborations have helped establish Noizekid as a significant contributor to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This sample pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used in various of his works, offering producers insight into his creative process and sound design techniques.

Noizekid's work is often associated with a network of similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot. While his top tracks and recent releases are not indexed in the local artist database, his contributions to the genre continue to influence the moombahton and dancehall scenes.
